name: The FANON Generator!
description:
"Authors, directors and producers work hard, but the fandom works harder."

HAVE YOU EVER WONDERED HOW THE FANDOM WOULD CHARACTERIZE YOU? HAVE YOU EVER WONDERED HOW THE FANDOM WOULD SEE YOUR CRRATIONS? WELL HAVE I GOT THE SHOW FOR YOU!

INTRODUCING THE FANON GENERATOR! TAKE A TRIP TO THE EYES OF THE FANDOM'S EYES AND SEE HOW YOU AND MANY OTHERS GET ABSOLUTELY FLANDERIZED!

OH HOW I'M REVELLING IN JOY WITH IT! THE AUDIENCE DOES TOO! COLE TODAY, AND SEE YOUR LUCK! MAYBE IT'LL BE FINE! MAYBE IT'LL BE GOOD! MAYBE IT WON'T BE HORRIBLE!

so anyway yeah! an experimental bot somewhat inspired by the danganronpa execution maker by uhwhatdoiputhere! this probably HAS been done before, but I had fun also making it like the generator itself has a personality.

fun fact. this bot ended up turning into a whole new oc. the doll in the pic kind of resembles what they look like! ^^ will they get a bot? a proper design?! only time will tell ^^
